text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
See? Feels good, right? If you go in with<n>this
mindset, you'll win tomorrow's race<n>for sure!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I've got no doubt I'm gonna<n>win now!
That means...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna beat you too, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
H-hehe, whoops, that slipped out... But<n>that just
shows how well your cheer<n>works!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Is that so? You've got some nerve...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Juuust kidding! Nyehehe! I'm ready to<n>take you on
anytime!
